SEC.125: ADD'L-FUNDS 3U.S.C.102-NOTE+SIMILAR-EXPENSES  
  IN ADDITION TO OTHER-AVAILABLE-AMOUNTS  
  PROVIDED: TRANSFER→OTHER-ACCOUNTS(OTHER-AGENCIES) SUPPORT EXEC-OFFICE-PRESIDENT ∧ OFFICE-VICE-PRESIDENT  
  USE: CARRY-OUT PURPOSES ∧ REIMBURSE PRE-ENACTMENT OBLIGATIONS  

SEC.126: ADD'L-FUNDS DIST-OF-COLUMBIA—FED-EMERGENCY-PLANNING∧SECURITY  
  OPERATION-RATE=USD47M  
  INAUGURATION-COSTS(2025-JAN)  
  PROVIDED: APPORTION≤OPERATION-RATE→MAINTAIN EMERGENCY/SECURITY-ACTIVITIES FOR INAUGURATION  

SEC.127(A): PRE-PROVISO "FED-PAYMENT TO DCPDS"(DIVB,PL118-47) DELETE RELOCATION-COSTS CLAUSE  
SEC.127(B): SUBSEC(A) EFFECTIVE=NOW  
  IF ENACTMENT>2024-09-30 ⇒ SUBSEC(A) EFFECTIVE=2024-09-30  
SEC.127(C): NOTWITHSTAND §101 → APPLY AMENDED PRE-PROVISO AS IF STRUCK  
  TEXT=", OF WHICH USD3M REMAINS AVAILABLE UNTIL 2026-09-30"  

SEC.128: NOTWITHSTAND EXCEPT §106 → D.C. MAY EXPEND LOCAL-FUNDS("DC—DC-FUNDS") FOR PROGRAMS/ACTIVITIES UNDER DC-APPROPS-2024(DIVB-TITLEIV,PL118-47)  
  AT RATE=FY2025-LOCAL-BUDGET-ACT-2024(D.C.ACT25-501) AS MODIFIED AT ENACTMENT  

SEC.129: NOTWITHSTAND §101 → APPROPRIATE USD19,424,177 TO GSA—PRES-TRANSITION EXPENSES FY2025  
  AVAILABLE UNTIL 2025-09-30  
  ALLOCATE: USD14,443,726→SECTIONS3(a)(1–7,10) ∧ USD2,980,451→SECTION5 ∧ USD2,000,000→SECTIONS3(a)(8,9)  
  CANDIDATE-SHARES: IF≥2 APPARENT-CANDIDATES(EXC INCUMBENT)⇒PROPORTIONAL SHARE OF SECTIONS3(a)(1–7,10) ∧ 3(a)(8,9)  
    CAP: ≤USD7,221,863 FOR SECTIONS3(a)(1–7,10) ∧ ≤USD1,000,000 FOR SECTIONS3(a)(8,9)  
  TRANSFER: AMOUNTS MAY TRANSFER→Acquisition-Services-Fund/Federal-Buildings-Fund TO REIMBURSE PRE-ENACTMENT OBLIGATIONS (2024-PRES-ELECTION)  
  RESCIND: AFTERSOLE APPARENT-CANDIDATE DETERMINED ⇒ CANCEL REMAINING-FUNDS OF UNSUCCESSFUL  
  ADDITIONAL: AMOUNTS ADD’L TO OTHER-AVAILABLE FOR SAME-PURPOSES  

SEC.129(B): NOTWITHSTAND §101 → NO-FUNDS FOR GSA—PRE-ELECTION PRES-TRANSITION  

SEC.130: ADD'L-FUNDS NARA—OPERATING-EXPENSES FY2025=USD23M  
  UNTIL 2025-09-30  
  PURPOSE: PRES-RECORDS-ACT(44 USC 2201–2209)  

SEC.131: NOTWITHSTAND §101 → SUBST PRE-PROVISO "OPM—SALARIES∧EXPENSES"(DIVB,PL118-47): USD219,076,000→USD190,784,000  
  AND SUBST SECOND-PROVISO: USD192,975,000→USD245,267,000  

SEC.132: NOTWITHSTAND §104 → DHS—COAST-GUARD PROC/CONSTR/IMPROVEMENTS FUNDS  
  MAY USE→CLOSEOUT-COSTS FOR C–27J MISSIONIZATION-PROGRAM
